_comment_target: FSDP smoke for action-aware embodiment adapter — exercises end-to-end plumbing of 8-d (joint+gripper) actions through dataset → precompute cache → train loop → embodiment.action_aware_adaln cross-attention. 10 videos × 2 epochs ≈ 5 min wall-clock. Cache will MISS on first run (key now includes has_actions+stats) and rebuild from the 10-vid metadata.
_action_note: 8-d (joint_position 7 + gripper 1) z-scored against train-split stats. Dataset truncates the trailing post-final action so action[i] aligns with camera_frame[i].
_cache_note: Different cache file from the egowm smoke because the actions key changes the precompute output. Bumped _PRECOMPUTE_CACHE_VERSION → 2 so v1 caches MISS automatically too.
